name: bopscrk
title: bopscrk

commands.name: bopscrk

arguments.description: show this help message and exit
arguments.raw: -h, --help         show this help message and exit

arguments.description: interactive mode, the script will ask you about target
arguments.raw: -i, --interactive  interactive mode, the script will ask you about target

arguments.description: words to combine comma-separated (will be combined with
arguments.raw: -w                 words to combine comma-separated (will be combined with

arguments.description: min length for the words to generate (default: 4)
arguments.raw: -m, --min          min length for the words to generate (default: 4)

arguments.description: max length for the words to generate (default: 12)
arguments.raw: -M, --max          max length for the words to generate (default: 12)

arguments.description: max amount of words to combine each time (default: 2)
arguments.raw: -n                 max amount of words to combine each time (default: 2)

arguments.description: output file to save the wordlist (default: tmp.txt)
arguments.raw: -o, --output       output file to save the wordlist (default: tmp.txt)

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# bopscrk -h
 usage: bopscrk [-h] [-i] [-w ] [-m ] [-M ] [-c] [-l] [-n ] [-a ] [-o ] [-C ]
              [--version]
 
 Generates smart and powerful wordlists.
 
 options:
 -h, --help         show this help message and exit
 -i, --interactive  interactive mode, the script will ask you about target
 -w                 words to combine comma-separated (will be combined with
                    all words)
 -m, --min          min length for the words to generate (default: 4)
 -M, --max          max length for the words to generate (default: 12)
 -c, --case         enable case transformations
 -l, --leet         enable leet transformations
 -n                 max amount of words to combine each time (default: 2)
 -a, --artists      artists to search song lyrics (comma-separated)
 -o, --output       output file to save the wordlist (default: tmp.txt)
 -C, --config       specify config file to use (default:
                    /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/bopscrk/bopscrk.cfg)
 --version          print version and exit

bopscrk: error: unrecognized arguments: help

apt_metadata.description:
Generate smart and powerful wordlists
Targeted-attack wordlist creator: introduce personal info related to target,
combines every word and transforms results into possible passwords. The
lyricpass module allows one to search lyrics related to artists and include
them to the wordlists.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.
